Is_External: MED-03 (PostgreSQL) and MED-06 (Redis) are marked as Is_External = No. Eta implies kore self-hosting on bare-metal servers. If we actually do hosting them on AWS (like RDS or ElastiCache), they would technically need to be Is_External = Yes with a Has_BAC = Yes just like we did for the HAPI DBss
